records.ety: [F. calamine, LL. calamina, fr. L. Cadmia. See Cadmia.]

defs: A mineral, the hydrous silicate of zinc.
notes: ☞ The name was formerly applied to both the carbonate and silicate of zinc each of which is valuabic as an ore; but it is now usually restricted to the latter, the former being called smithsonite.
